languages.text: "Первостепенные функции жизнеформы "генетор" были фатально нарушены. Но жизнеформе "вивисектор" удалось своевременно заменить поврежденные механизмы кортикальным имплантом. Функционирование восстановлено". {n}Несколько секунд Ферренц молчит, а затем равнодушно добавляет.{/n} "Дополнительные визоры были повреждены и изъяты, эффективность диагностического сканирования упала на 30 процентов".
languages.translation_comment: Если вставлен аугмент (2\3 в руте аугментатора)

languages.text: "The primary functions of the Genetor life form were fatally compromised. But the Vivisector life form managed to replace the damaged mechanisms with a cortical implant in time. Functionality has been restored." {n}Ferrenz is silent for a few seconds, then adds indifferently,{/n} "The auxiliary visors were damaged and removed. Diagnostic scan efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."
languages.original_text: "Первостепенные функции жизнеформы "генетор" были фатально нарушены. Но жизнеформе "вивисектор" удалось своевременно заменить поврежденные механизмы кортикальным имплантом. Функционирование восстановлено". {n}Несколько секунд Ферренц молчит, а затем равнодушно добавляет.{/n} "Дополнительные визоры были повреждены и изъяты, эффективность диагностического сканирования упала на 30 процентов".

Diagnostic scan efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."

Diagnostic efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."

languages.text: 「ジェネーター」ユニットの主要機能が致命的に損傷した。しかし「バイセクター」ユニットは、損傷した機構を脳の移植片で間に合わせに交換した。機能は回復した。{n}フェレンツは数秒間沈黙した後、無関心な口調で付け加えた。{/n}「ユニットの補助バイザーが損傷し、取り外された。診断効率が30パーセント低下した」
languages.original_text: "The primary functions of the 'Genetor' unit were fatally compromised. But the Vivisector unit managed to replace the damaged mechanisms with a cortical implant in time. Functionality has been restored." {n}Ferrenz is silent for a few seconds, then adds indifferently,{/n} "The unit's auxiliary visors were damaged and removed. Diagnostic efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."

traits.locale_text: 「ジェネーター」ユニットの主要機能が致命的に損傷した。しかし「バイセクター」ユニットは、損傷した機構を脳の移植片で間に合わせに交換した。機能は回復した。{n}フェレンツは数秒間沈黙した後、無関心な口調で付け加えた。{n}「ユニットの補助バイザーが損傷し、取り外された。診断効率が30パーセント低下した。」

languages.text: "Genetör yaşam formunun birincil işlevleri, ölümcül şekilde tehlikeye girdi. Ancak Dirikesimci yaşam formu, hasarlı mekanizmaları zamanında bir zihinsel implantla değiştirmeyi başardı. İşlevsellik geri yüklendi." {n}Ferrenz, birkaç saniye sessiz kalıp kayıtsızca ekliyor.{/n} "Yardımcı vizörleri hasar gördü ve çıkarıldı. Teşhis taraması verimliliği yüzde 30 azaldı."
languages.original_text: "The primary functions of the Genetor life form were fatally compromised. But the Vivisector life form managed to replace the damaged mechanisms with a cortical implant in time. Functionality has been restored." {n}Ferrenz is silent for a few seconds, then adds indifferently,{/n} "The auxiliary visors were damaged and removed. Diagnostic scan efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."

traits.locale_text: "Genetör yaşam formunun birincil işlevleri, ölümcül şekilde tehlikeye girdi. Ancak Dirikesimci yaşam formu, hasarlı mekanizmaları zamanında bir zihinsel implantla değiştirmeyi başardı. İşlevsellik geri yüklendi." {n}Ferrenz, birkaç saniye sessiz kalıp kayıtsızca ekliyor.{/n} "Yardımcı vizörleri hasar gördü ve çıkarıldı. Teşhis taraması verimliliği yüzde 30 azaldı."

languages.text: «Las funciones principales de la forma de vida genetor quedaron letalmente inutilizadas, pero la forma de vida vivisector logró reemplazar los mecanismos dañados con un implante cortical a tiempo. La funcionalidad se restauró». {n}Ferrenz guarda silencio durante unos segundos, y después añade con indiferencia:{/n} «Los visores auxiliares quedaron dañados y se retiraron. La eficacia de escaneo de diagnóstico se ha reducido un 30 por ciento».
languages.original_text: "The primary functions of the Genetor life form were fatally compromised. But the Vivisector life form managed to replace the damaged mechanisms with a cortical implant in time. Functionality has been restored." {n}Ferrenz is silent for a few seconds, then adds indifferently,{/n} "The auxiliary visors were damaged and removed. Diagnostic scan efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."

traits.locale_text: «Las funciones principales de la forma de vida genetor quedaron letalmente inutilizadas, pero la forma de vida vivisector logró reemplazar los mecanismos dañados con un implante cortical a tiempo. La funcionalidad se restauró». {n}Ferrenz guarda silencio durante unos segundos, y después añade con indiferencia:{/n} «Los visores auxiliares quedaron dañados y se retiraron. La eficacia de escaneo de diagnóstico se ha reducido un 30 por ciento».

languages.text: “基因士生命体的主要功能遭受致命损害，但解剖者生命体用皮层植入物及时替换了受损部件，功能已恢复。”{n}费伦茨沉默几秒，漠然补充道，{/n}“辅助目镜受损，已被移除。诊断效率下降百分之三十。”
languages.original_text: "The primary functions of the Genetor life form were fatally compromised. But the Vivisector life form managed to replace the damaged mechanisms with a cortical implant in time. Functionality has been restored." {n}Ferrenz is silent for a few seconds, then adds indifferently,{/n} "The auxiliary visors were damaged and removed. Diagnostic scan efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."

traits.locale_text: “基因士生命体的主要功能遭受致命损害，但解剖者生命体用皮层植入物及时替换了受损部件，功能已恢复。”{n}费伦茨沉默几秒，漠然补充道，{/n}“辅助目镜受损，已被移除。诊断效率下降百分之三十。”

languages.text: « Les fonctions principales de l'entité genetor ont subi des dommages fatals, mais l'entité vivisector est intervenue à temps en remplaçant les mécanismes hors d'usage par un implant cortical. Les capacités idoines ont ainsi été rétablies. » {n}Ferrenz s'interrompt quelques secondes, puis ajoute sur un ton indifférent :{/n} « Les visières auxiliaires ont été retirées, car irréparables. L'efficacité des diagnostics a augmenté de trente pour cent. »
languages.original_text: "The primary functions of the Genetor life form were fatally compromised. But the Vivisector life form managed to replace the damaged mechanisms with a cortical implant in time. Functionality has been restored." {n}Ferrenz is silent for a few seconds, then adds indifferently,{/n} "The auxiliary visors were damaged and removed. Diagnostic scan efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."

traits.locale_text: « Les fonctions principales de l'entité genetor ont subi des dommages fatals, mais l'entité vivisector est intervenue à temps en remplaçant les mécanismes hors d'usage par un implant cortical. Les capacités idoines ont ainsi été rétablies. » {n}Ferrenz s'interrompt quelques secondes, puis ajoute sur un ton indifférent :{/n} « Les visières auxiliaires ont été retirées, car irréparables. L'efficacité des diagnostics a augmenté de trente pour cent. »

languages.text: "Die Primärfunktionen der Lebensform Genetor wurden irreparabel beschädigt. Die Lebensform Vivisektor konnte die beschädigten Mechanismen allerdings rechtzeitig durch ein kortikales Implantat ersetzen. Die Funktionalität wurde wiederhergestellt." {n}Ferrenz schweigt einige Sekunden, ehe er gleichgültig hinzufügt:{/n} "Die Hilfsvisoren wurden beschädigt und entfernt. Die diagnostische Scaneffizienz ist um 30 Prozent gesunken."
languages.original_text: "The primary functions of the Genetor life form were fatally compromised. But the Vivisector life form managed to replace the damaged mechanisms with a cortical implant in time. Functionality has been restored." {n}Ferrenz is silent for a few seconds, then adds indifferently,{/n} "The auxiliary visors were damaged and removed. Diagnostic scan efficiency has decreased by 30 percent."
